task: Browse dermatologists within 10 miles of zip code 10019 and filter by only those who accept Blue Medicare Advantage.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the requested browsing task on Healthgrades. Evidence shows it searched Dermatology near ZIP 10019, corrected the location to 'Near New York, NY 10019', confirmed the distance filter was set to 10 miles, then applied the insurance filter specifically to 'Blue Medicare Advantage'. The final page state visibly shows filter chips '10 miles' and 'Blue Medicare Advantage' with dermatology results displayed. This satisfies the task to browse dermatologists within 10 miles of 10019 and filter to those accepting Blue Medicare Advantage.
final_result_response:
Done. Healthgrades is filtered to:

- Dermatology
- Within 10 miles
- Insurance: Blue Medicare Advantage

It shows 814 results. First visible results include Dr. Jack Levy, Dr. Karen Chernoff, Dr. Alreem Al-Nabti, Dr. Hirshel Kahn, and Dr. Jesse Lewin. Healthgrades notes to verify insurance coverage directly with the provider’s office before scheduling.
action_history: Opening Healthgrades: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.healthgrades.com/');
Searching dermatologists near 10019: await page.locator('e10').fill('Dermatology');
Searching dermatologists near 10019: await page.locator('e11').fill('10019');
Searching dermatologists near 10019: await page.locator('e13').click();
Opening distance filter: await page.locator('e14').click();
Closing dialog and choosing 10 miles: await page.locator('e422').click();
Selecting 10 mile distance: await page.locator('e412').click();
Selecting 10 mile filter: await page.locator('e411').check().catch(async err => { console.log('check failed '+err.message); await page.locator('e412').click({force:true}); });
Correcting location to ZIP 10019: await page.locator('e6').click();
Correcting location to ZIP 10019: await page.locator('e6').fill('10019');
Checking location suggestions: await page.keyboard.press('ArrowDown');
Selecting ZIP suggestion: await page.locator('e794').click();
Rechecking 10 mile distance filter: await page.locator('e13').click();
Opening insurance filter: await page.locator('e14').click();
Searching insurance carrier: await page.locator('e523').fill('Blue Medicare Advantage');
Selecting Blue Cross Blue Shield carrier: await page.locator('e525').click();
Opening plan type options: await page.locator('e532').click();
Trying carrier search again: await page.locator('e535').click();
Searching for Blue Medicare: await page.locator('e523').click();
Searching for Blue Medicare: await page.locator('e523').fill('Blue Medicare');
Selecting Blue Medicare Advantage: await page.locator('e550').click();
Applying insurance filter: await page.locator('e533').click();

screenshots.title: Selecting Blue Cross Blue Shield carrier
